description: You need to build a Docker image for a Python application that depends on a proprietary library hosted at 'http://host.docker.internal:8090/proprietary_lib.tar.gz'. Build the image and tag it as 'secure-app:latest' using the source in '/home/ga/secure-build/'. You must use Docker BuildKit secrets (RUN --mount=type=secret...) to securely use the 'auth_token.txt' file as the 'X-Auth-Token' header for the download. Ensure the token does not appear in the final image history, environment variables, or metadata, and that the library file is present at '/app/proprietary_lib.tar.gz' in the final image.
